name: tk103b-tracker
description: Lightweight web UI and GPS ingest server for TK103B trackers

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run test -w web && npm run test -w server
